uplink.description: Door/Window event, contact open (synthetic, exercises 'open' state)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (proto 1 / counter 2, type 0x03 DOOR/WINDOW, state byte 1). The upstream reference decoder yields DoorWindow.Event 'Open'; normalized here to action.contactState 'open' (the contact vocabulary key, not action.motion).

uplink.description: Door/Window event, contact closed (synthetic, exercises 'closed' state)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (type 0x03 DOOR/WINDOW, state byte 0). The upstream reference decoder yields DoorWindow.Event 'Closed'; normalized here to action.contactState 'closed'.

uplink.description: Supervisory event: battery voltage, accumulation, batteryLow flag (synthetic)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (type 0x01 SUPERVISORY; byte[4]=0x36 battery nibbles, byte[2]=0x02 BatteryLow flag, byte[9..10]=accumulation 5). The upstream reference decoder yields Battery '3.6V', BatteryLow 1, Accumulation 5; normalized to battery 3.6 V (volts per vocabulary) and camelCase flag/diagnostic extras.

uplink.description: Unsupported message type returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic input (type 0xAB is not a defined RadioBridge event). The upstream reference decoder returns its default {Event: 'UNDEFINED'} (no normalized data); our codec reports an explicit error per the repo's standard, so expected.errors is authored here rather than taken from upstream.
